about: Monthly AI code-review cost (e.g. GitHub Copilot) voluntarily contributed by the maintainer for vox. Reported out-of-band via a repository_dispatch (type 'ai-review-cost') from the maintainer's separate billing context; no billing-account identity or mechanism is stored here. GitHub exposes no per-repository attribution, so figures are a good-faith monthly disclosure. tools/cost_collector.py reads this into the cost-ledger snapshot. Lives on the orphan cost-data branch so refreshes never trigger code CI.
